template_data.quote_html: The prime brings the past performance. You bring the capability.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic split-panel layout. Left panel dark navy: bold label 'THE BLOCK' at top, illustrated professional looking uncertain, short label 'NO FEDERAL RECORD' below with red X icon. Right panel cream/white: bold label 'THE MOVE' at top, illustrated two professionals shaking hands, short label 'FIND A PRIME' below with green arrow icon. Center dividing line with upward arrow. Bold headline at top: 'TEAMING IS YOUR WAY IN'. Bottom callout box dark navy: short phrase 'PRIME BRINGS RECORD. YOU BRING SKILL.' Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
